metaDescription: Clinique du VR privacy policy for estimate requests, appointments, and customer communications.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.body: Clinique du VR protects the information voluntarily shared by email, phone, contact form, or appointment booking.

sections.heading: Information collected
sections.body: When you contact us, we may collect your name, email address, phone number, details about your RV, and any information useful to your service request.

sections.heading: Use of information
sections.body: This information is used to respond to your request, schedule an appointment, prepare an estimate, or follow up on a service, inspection, or repair file.

sections.heading: Compliance and retention
sections.body: The site is designed to support a minimal approach to personal information handling and to comply with the applicable requirements of Law 25 in Quebec. We do not sell your personal information, and we only use the information needed to process your request.

sections.heading: Cookies, tracking and navigation
sections.body: The site does not use Google Ads, Google Analytics, or other advertising or analytics tracking tools. No advertising cookies are placed and no browsing information is kept to profile users.

sections.heading: Questions
sections.body: For any question related to privacy or your information, email info@cliniqueduvr.ca or call (581) 337-3366.
